calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-28-2022 Off Calendar

Notice Of Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing As To Defendant Javier Isaias Garcia (Notices)
Off Calendar May-12-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Prove-Up Hearing as to defaulted defendant Javier Isaias Garcia, an individual, dba J&R Tree Service.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: K. Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 10:42 a.m., adjourning at 10:44 a.m. and reconvening at 10:51 a.m.

Mark M. Scott, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C., a Washington limited liability company.
Lorren Dalesky, Collection Manager and Custodian of Records for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Both Messrs. Scott and Dalesky appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
No appearance by defendant Javier Isaias Garcia, an individual, dba J&R Tree Service.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Equipment Financing Agreements was filed on September 8, 2021, and personally served on defendant Javier Isaias Garcia, an individual, dba J&R Tree Service, on December 6, 2021.
Default as to defendant Javier Isaias Garcia, an individual, dba J&R Tree Service, was entered on January 12, 2022.
DOE defendants were dismissed on March 3, 2022.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Orion First Financial, L.L.C., a Washington limited liability company, and against the defaulted defendant Javier Isaias Garcia, an individual, dba J&R Tree Service, as follows:

Damages - $42,484.26.
Prejudgment Interest - Waived.
Attorney Fees - $1,005.35.
Costs - $743.25.

Total - $44,232.86.

Proposed Judgment Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Proceedings concluded at 11:11 a.m.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-28-2022 Continued To Jul-20-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-20-2022 Continued To Mar-23-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
